title: Dye+
description: Adds ways to combine items like wool and concrete powder to form different colors, and adds and adds recipes for dyes, (in which they should have) such as one for green dye and a few for brown dye.
body:
# What is this mod?
You have been traveling for a long time, too long... looking for a desert for a cactus or a jungle for cocoa beans so you can craft a dye to make your structure complete... And now with this mod you don't have to!
**_Dye+_** is a mod made by NovaTek that allows for better recipes for dyes, without needing to traverse vast distances to find one to two items just to make a color, greatly impacting a person's experience making things easier.

> [WARNING]
> **Dye+ has been discontinued and has been replaced by [Colors+](https://modrinth.com/mod/colors+).** All future development will be on Colors+. This repository is archived and will no longer receive updates.

# ✅Feats:
 You can finally craft dyes such as green dye and brown dye without needing to find and obtain a cactus and/or a cocoa bean, using pre-existing dyes such as yellow and blue, and red and green. You can also mix wool **OR** concrete powder colors in a crafting table to make different colors, like the dye system.
|   Item Name         | OG recipe             |  Dye+ Recipe         |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Brown Dye           |  Cocoa beans          | Red+Blue+Yellow, Red+Green, etc.  |
| Green Dye           |  Cactus               | Yellow+Blue             |
| Colored Wool        |  White Wool + Dye     | Colored Wool+Colored Wool|
| Stained Glass       | Stained Glass + Dye   | Stained Glass + Stained Glass |

# Color Crafting System 
In a crafting table, Colored Wool and Colored Concrete Powder acts like dye.\
If you mix red dye + blue dye, you get purple dye.\
And the same for these colored blocks.\
Red Wool + White wool gives you pink wool, Blue + Yellow Concrete powder gives you green concrete powder, etc.

# How to install:
First, you need to get the version of Forge or NeoForge that you want that is supported by the mod.\
After you download it, run it and make sure it downloads correctly.\
After that is done, get the version of the mod compatible with the version and put it in the **.mods** folder on your minecraft installation. It should now be complete!

# Wiki
https://dyeplus.fandom.com/wiki/Dye%2B_Wiki

# Updates
